task_completion.description: Verify that the Profiles class schema was updated to include the AccountStatus property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrientDB Studio Schema tab for the 'Profiles' class showing a new property named 'AccountStatus' of type STRING, or a successful SQL command execution like 'CREATE PROPERTY Profiles.AccountStatus STRING'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the SuspensionLog vertex class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'SuspensionLog' in the OrientDB Studio Schema/Classes list with the superclass 'V' (Vertex), or a successful SQL command execution creating the class.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the HasSuspensionLog edge class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'HasSuspensionLog' in the OrientDB Studio Schema/Classes list with the superclass 'E' (Edge), or a successful SQL command execution creating the class.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bot accounts were correctly identified and marked as Suspended.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for query results in the Browse tab showing the Profiles for 'bot.alpha@spamnet.com' and 'bot.beta@spamnet.com' with their 'AccountStatus' field set to 'Suspended'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the innocent user (below the 3-review threshold) was NOT suspended.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for query results showing the Profile for 'innocent.user@normal.com' where the 'AccountStatus' is either null, empty, or explicitly NOT 'Suspended'.

task_completion.description: Verify that SuspensionLog vertices were created with the correct reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for query results or record views of the 'SuspensionLog' class showing records with the 'Reason' property set to 'Review Bombing'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the suspended profiles are linked to their suspension logs via the HasSuspensionLog edge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Graph view or edge query results in OrientDB Studio showing 'HasSuspensionLog' edges connecting the suspended Profile vertices to the SuspensionLog vertices.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating to http://localhost:2480 and interacting with the OrientDB Studio UI (Browse, Schema, or Graph tabs).

integrity.description: The agent actually executed queries or modified the schema within the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for executed SQL queries in the query editor, success notification banners, or populated data tables in the OrientDB Studio interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should show the database management interface, not a text editor (like nano, vim, or VSCode) containing the task description or hardcoded JSON answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database: demodb. Bot accounts to suspend: bot.alpha@spamnet.com (3 reviews) and bot.beta@spamnet.com (4 reviews). Innocent account NOT to suspend: innocent.user@normal.com (2 reviews). Target status: 'Suspended'. Log class: 'SuspensionLog'. Edge class: 'HasSuspensionLog'. Reason text: 'Review Bombing'.
